title: Mitos LLM-legible error envelope
description: The error body returned by the forkd sandbox API and the standalone sandbox-server. The primary reader is a language model: every error carries a stable machine code, a one-sentence cause, an actionable remediation, and structured context. See docs/api/errors.md (the normative catalogue) and docs/api/v2-spec.md section 2.3.

code.description: Stable machine-readable error code. One of the values in docs/api/errors.md.

message.description: One-line human and LLM-legible summary from the catalogue.

cause.description: The call-site detail: sandbox ids, paths, and operation names only. Never a secret value, bearer token, or credential.

remediation.description: An actionable next step the agent can take. Always present and non-empty.

context.description: Structured fields for the code: for example {"sandbox":"sb-7"} or {"sandbox":"sb-7","path":"/work/out.txt"}. Never contains a secret value.
